channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Over 1,000 Hollywood professionals oppose Paramount–Warner Bros. Discovery merger over industry concerns
item.description: More than 1,000 prominent figures from Hollywood, including leading actors, directors, and writers, have jointly expressed strong opposition to the proposed $111 billion merger between Paramount and W...

item.title: PHILTA and Indian Tennis Standouts Set to Compete in 2026 Palawan Open
item.description: The 2026 Palawan Open is shaping up to be one of the most anticipated tennis tournaments in the Philippines this year, as top players from the Philippine Lawn Tennis Association (PHILTA) will be joine...

item.title: Protest in Islamabad’s Noorpur Shahan Injures Two Policemen During CDA Drive
item.description: In Islamabad’s Noorpur Shahan area, tensions escalated as the Capital Development Authority (CDA) launched an anti-encroachment operation. The operation, intended to clear illegal structures, faced st...

item.title: Research Links Early Smell Loss to Alzheimer's Disease
item.description: A recent study conducted by DZNE and Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München suggests that loss of smell may serve as an early indicator of Alzheimer's disease. The research indicates that Alzheimer’s ...

item.title: Former Duterte aide waives bank secrecy during House impeachment hearing
item.description: Ramil Madriaga, who identified himself as a former aide and alleged bagman of Vice President Sara Duterte, signed a bank secrecy waiver during a hearing of the House of Representatives' justice commit...

item.title: PCB suspends Blessing Muzarabani for two PSL seasons after contract breach
item.description: The Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) has announced a two-season ban on Zimbabwe’s fast bowler Blessing Muzarabani from participating in the Pakistan Super League (PSL). The decision, made after a detailed...

item.title: Arvind Kejriwal to Support DMK in Tamil Nadu Ahead of 2026 Assembly Elections
item.description: On April 14, 2026, political campaigning across several Indian states intensified as Assembly elections drew closer. Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) national convener and former Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejr...

item.title: Report: Israel's Role in Conflict with Iran Gains Recognition in US Media
item.description: A recent report from nuclear-news.net details a shift in U.S. mainstream media coverage regarding the ongoing conflict between the United States and Iran. Initially, the media portrayed the conflict a...

item.title: Key candidates in Farrer byelection prepare for tough contest
item.description: Raissa Butkowski, the Liberal candidate for the Farrer byelection, has drawn the top position on the ballot paper for the May 9 vote, competing against eleven other candidates. Butkowski, a lawyer wor...

item.title: International Federation Recognises Pakistan’s Air Traffic Controllers Amid Increased Regional Air Traffic
item.description: The International Federation of Air Traffic Controllers’ Associations (IFATCA) has formally recognised the exceptional professionalism and dedication of Pakistan’s air traffic controllers. This acknow...

item.title: UK Companies Explore US Market Opportunities with 'Big in America' Initiative
item.description: A diverse range of UK businesses are actively seeking to expand their presence in the United States market, as highlighted by a collection of reports and initiatives under the 'Big in America' umbrell...

item.title: Pakistan works to host renewed US-Iran peace talks amid fragile ceasefire
item.description: Negotiating teams from the United States and Iran are expected to possibly return to Islamabad later this week for another round of peace talks, according to multiple diplomatic and government sources...

item.title: Two Fishermen Drown After Sudden Storm Capsizes Boat on Lake Victoria in Homa Bay
item.description: Late on Sunday night, a sudden and severe storm on Lake Victoria caused a boat carrying four fishermen to capsize near Kagwa Beach in Homa Bay. The unexpected strong winds and heavy rainfall caught th...

item.title: ODM accuses top Ruto officials of undermining coalition unity ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: A fierce political storm is brewing within Kenya’s broad-based government as the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) accuses senior officials in President William Ruto’s administration of bribing its Mem...

item.title: Youth political engagement, integrity, and the struggle against corruption in African democracies
item.description: The article discusses the role of young people in politics, particularly in Tanzania and across Africa, and questions whether some young political actors are contributing to the weakening of democrati...

item.title: Market Spotlight: LVMH, JPMorgan and American Airlines in Focus Ahead of Earnings and Macro Shifts
item.description: Wall Street is closely tracking shares of luxury‑goods giant LVMH, banking leader JPMorgan Chase, and airline operator American Airlines as investors assess how geopolitical tensions, interest‑rate dy...

item.title: Michael Rosen denied boarding on EU flight due to post-Brexit passport validity rules
item.description: The celebrated British children’s author Michael Rosen was prevented from boarding a Ryanair flight from London Stansted to Bologna, where he had been due to attend the Bologna Children’s Book Fair an...

item.title: Bafana Bafana Aim to Make History at 2026 Fifa World Cup
item.description: Bafana Bafana will be aiming to advance beyond the group stage at the 2026 Fifa World Cup, marking a historic achievement for South African football. Drawn in Group A alongside Mexico, Korea Republic,...

item.title: Ex-bagman alleges Pharmally funds supported Sara Duterte's 2022 election bid
item.description: During a House justice panel hearing on April 14, 2026, Ramil Madriaga, alleged former bagman of Vice President Sara Duterte, claimed that he received campaign funding from Pharmally executives. Madri...

item.title: Analysis of Trump–Pope tensions, US Iran policy and geopolitical developments in Decoding America podcast
item.description: This episode of the Decoding America podcast, hosted by Reged Ahmad with Jonathan Yerushalmy for Guardian Australia, explores several interconnected developments in US politics and foreign policy. A c...
